channel.title: GitHub Pascal Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Pascal in GitHub

item.title: cheat-engine/cheat-engine
item.description: Cheat Engine. A development environment focused on modding

item.title: skia4delphi/skia4delphi
item.description: Skia4Delphi is a cross-platform 2D graphics API for Delphi platforms based on Google's Skia Graphics Library. It provides a comprehensive 2D API that can be used across mobile, server and desktop models to render images.

item.title: HashLoad/horse
item.description: Fast, opinionated, minimalist web framework for Delphi

item.title: Runixe786/MD3-Windows
item.description: Material you widgets for your windows desktop, adaptable with wallpaper colors with both light & dark modes

item.title: UltraStar-Deluxe/USDX
item.description: The free and open source karaoke singing game UltraStar Deluxe, inspired by Sony SingStar™

item.title: transmission-remote-gui/transgui
item.description: 🧲 A feature rich cross platform Transmission BitTorrent client. Faster and has more functionality than the built-in web GUI.

item.title: nofeletru/UsbAsp-flash
item.description: Program allow you to program flash memory on the protocols spi, I2C, MicroWire. Supports CH341a, CH347, UsbAsp, AVRISP(LUFA), Arduino, FT232H.

item.title: TES5Edit/TES5Edit
item.description: xEdit by Elminster; Updated and maintained by Sharlikran, Zilav, and Hlp

item.title: Embarcadero/Dev-Cpp
item.description: A fast, portable, simple, and free C/C++ IDE

item.title: benjamimgois/goverlay
item.description: GOverlay is an opensource project that aims to create a Graphical UI to help manage Linux overlays.

item.title: paolo-rossi/delphi-jose-jwt
item.description: Delphi implementation of JOSE (JSON Object Signing and Encryption) and JWT (JSON Web Token)
